---
format:
  gfm:
    default-image-extension: ""
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.qmd. Please edit that file -->

# y2print

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

y2print enhances the display of frequency tibbles from the y2clerk package.

## Installation

You can install the development version of y2print from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("y2analytics/y2print")
```
